blockedAssertions.blockedBy: `cargo test --test streaming_state_machine_contract -- --nocapture` passed `interleaved_output_and_content_indices_stay_isolated`, which proves interleaved `output_text` and `function_call_arguments` updates stay isolated by `output_index`/`content_index`. However, the observed mocked cargo surface does not include an interleaved `reasoning_text` fixture, so the full text/reasoning/tool isolation contract is not completely proven.

`cargo test --test responses_stream_contract -- --nocapture` passed `terminal_failure_and_refusal_states_remain_explicit`, proving explicit refusal and failed terminal handling, and `responses_structured_stream_contract` passed `malformed_json_and_refusals_fail_at_completion_boundary`, proving structured refusal does not synthesize a typed success. However, the observed cargo surface does not exercise a `response.incomplete` terminal fixture, which the contract explicitly requires.

`cargo test --test streaming_state_machine_contract -- --nocapture` passed `interleaved_output_and_content_indices_stay_isolated`, which proves structural `response.output_item.added` and `response.content_part.added` handling for text messages plus a function call. The observed fixture does not exercise multimodal content parts such as audio or other non-text parts, so the contract's full multimodal-assembly requirement is not completely proven.

appliedUpdates.description: Added guidance to use isolated CARGO_TARGET_DIR paths per flow and to expect source inspection when mapping passing cargo tests back to assertion-level contract coverage.
